race.comment: Tricky race to assess with a few of these facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade, SNITZSTREAM (15) has been right there in all three runs this preparation and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. Drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside alley and should be going close to breaking the maiden status. BOOZIE MISS (6) hit the frame at Eagle Farm on debut before being tipped out for time to furnish. Revved up for this with a recent trial placing and a strong showing while fresh would not surprise. The well-related VEOMAS (4) (half to G1 winner Seabrook) is a former Victorian having his first run for the new stable but should find this easier than what he faced down south. Has to be included. RUM AND KIRK (2) next in line from the favourable draw.
